title: Sloanea dasycarpa
taxonomy: Sloanea dasycarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Ebenaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Sloanea dasycarpa belongs to the order Oxalidales, a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Within the family Ebenaceae, Sloanea dasycarpa is one of the two known genera. The classification of Sloanea dasycarpa is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids.
